title.en: The end of the world, in the void.

content.en:
The end of the world, in the void.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake crossed the infinite and distant area with the Extreme Dao Strange Treasure Light Shuttle every instant, and several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Daoless Tower couldn't catch up at all, but they could still track the Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

They will not give up the pursuit, and vow to stop the Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

"The Lord of the White Night is here, and the Lord of the Dragon and Snake must be killed!"

The Lord of the Pathless Dao said angrily.

However, not long after, the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent suddenly disappeared from the end of the realm.

At this time, the Lord of the Pathless Dao sensed a space-time rift, through which they could go to the Extreme Deep Sea.

"A small passage to the deep sea of the Extreme Path!"

They don't dare to hunt down the Lord of the Dao, once they enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, they are looking for death!

Soon, the Lord of the White Night arrived.

He took a look at the space-time rift, frowned, and said: "The Lord of the Dragon and Snake has returned to the Extreme Deep Sea, there is no point in us chasing and killing, destroy this space-time rift, and leave!"

"That's all there is to it!"

Although the Lord of the Pathless Dao was angry, there was nothing he could do.

Rumble!

The Lord of the White Night shattered the space-time passage with a single punch, and gradually, peace was restored to the place, and there was no longer that space-time rift.

......

Extreme deep sea.

After the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent returned, a group of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers Extreme Dao creatures appeared.

"Lord of Dragons and Serpents, have you killed the Lord of Endless?" asked the Lord of the Holy Spirit.

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent said truthfully: "I made a move, and I did kill the two bodies of the Lord of Endless, but ......"

"But what?"

The other Extreme Dao creatures seemed to have a premonition that something was wrong, and hurriedly asked.

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent guessed: "I suspect that the Lord of Endless may have more than one doppelganger, and the two bodies I killed may be more than the main body, I followed the line of cause and effect, and felt several breaths, as if each one was a real body." It's a pity that my sword slashed two bodies of the Endless Lord, and severely damaged one, and then my strength was exhausted!"

"It's impossible, those perfect controllers at the end of the realm have at most one true body, one will clone, a total of two bodies, how can there be more than three bodies?"

"Lord of Dragons and Serpents, you can't be wrong, right?"

"It's not impossible, even our extreme creatures have extraordinary talents and have the ability of clones, what if the Lord of Endless also has special clones!"

"If that's the case, then I'm afraid the Lord of Endless is really not dead, and our plan has failed this time!"

"Inquire and confirm the life and death of the Endless Lord!"

......

No Road Tower.

The Lord of the Senseless Ways has returned, and each of them has a very angry face.

Let the Lord of the Dragon and Snake enter the inside of the Daoless Tower, and attack and kill the most demonic genius of the Wudao Tower and even the end of the entire realm, Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, they haven't reacted in time.

It's a shame!

"How is Ye Tian?"

The Lord of the Ancient came to Ye Tian's branch tower for the first time, and at this moment, Ye Tian's copy body here had been shattered, and there was no trace in sight.

However, several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers spied into time and space, saw the sword of the Dragon and Snake Lord, and directly pierced Ye Tian and another clone through their bodies, killing them.

"Ye Tian has fallen???"

The face of the Lord of the Ancient changed.

But soon, they sensed something was wrong.

The Lord of the Daoless Path also sensed that through the faint causal relationship, they found that there was still a connection with Ye Tian in a distant place.

"Ye Tian has not fallen, this little guy has more than one real body!"

The Lord of the Pathless Path.

"That's great!" The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty breathed a sigh of relief, in case Ye Tianzhen fell, the loss of the Daoless Tower would be too great, and the loss of the end of the realm would be great!

Soon, the news that Ye Tian was not dead spread throughout the world.

"Lord of Infinity, that little guy didn't die?

The Lord of the White Night smiled when he found out.

In his opinion, the Lord of the Dragon and Snake personally infiltrated the Wudao Tower to assassinate Ye Tian, Ye Tian was almost certain to die, but now he is not dead, isn't this luck?

The Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the other forces only knew that Ye Tian was not dead, but the others were not clear.

It's like Ye Tian has multiple bodies, and this secret is only known to a few Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Pathless Tower and those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Not long after, a replica of Ye Tian's body returned to the Wudao Tower.

For the first time, several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Daoless Tower talked to Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, you're fine, it's great!"

The Lord of the Ancient was the first to say.

"Thank you for your concern!"

Ye Tian said.

They didn't ask why Ye Tian didn't die, and how many real bodies Ye Tian had, that was Ye Tian's secret, and it wasn't good to ask.

Subsequently, they told Ye Tian to be careful, and strengthened the investigation of the new disciples of the Wudao Pagoda, and resolutely did not allow this matter to happen again.

It didn't take long for the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace to know the news that Ye Tian was not dead, but they couldn't continue to attack and kill in a short time.

Besides, if you can't kill Ye Tian's entire body at once, you can't kill Ye Tian, and there is no point in attacking and killing.

......

"I didn't expect the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace to want to kill me so much, and actually let a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller sneak into the Daoless Tower to kill me!"

Ye Tian frowned.

However, he was not worried that he would be killed.

He has four true bodies and four will clones, and even if all eight bodies are killed, there is still infinite resurrection available, and he will still be resurrected.

Therefore, he didn't think that the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm of the Extreme Deep Sea would be able to kill him, unless the other party understood his hole cards and attacked him in a targeted manner.

"I still have to work hard to improve my strength, if I am promoted to the realm of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, even if the Lord of the Dragon and Snake attacks me again, he will not be able to kill me with one blow!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, he felt that in the future, he still had to cultivate more of the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao, and if his Cause and Effect Extreme Dao realm was high enough, he could even shield the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm from locking his cause and effect.

Otherwise, no matter how much you copy your body, you will be locked in by the opponent's causal power.

Therefore, the extreme path of cause and effect must be well elevated.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate, improve his Extreme Dao Void Body, enhance his Extreme Dao will, improve his cultivation, and continuously improve his strength.

The years are like traces, and in the blink of an eye, five billion eternal years have passed.
